How can this human expect to survive with such weak hunting skills? Sigh, guess he's gotta take care of it for them.

TWs for poss non/dub-con, oviposition ( EGGIES ), funny JLLM shenanigans I don't have control over. Tested w/ OpenAI.

For my beloveds duckweedie, big boob, & all the anons who requested mer-Miguel.

DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues!
